category_sources: source_facts.description says it is an SDL 1.2 compatibility layer over SDL 2.0; official README says it provides low-level audio, keyboard, mouse, joystick, OpenGL, and framebuffer access across platforms.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is sdl12-compat; official GitHub repository and README use sdl12-compat.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README explains how to use, build, and configure sdl12-compat.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/libsdl-org/sdl12-compat, so repo was not redetermined per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies SDL 1.2 and SDL 2.0 compatibility; official README describes the compatibility layer and SDL multimedia APIs.
